name: gamemode
description: Toggle game mode (automatically) for improved performance.

commands.name: gamemode
commands.short_description: Toggle game mode (disables animations, blur, shadows, gaps, rounding).
commands.full_description: Toggle game mode (disables animations, blur, shadows, gaps, rounding).

config.name: border_size
config.description: Border size when game mode is enabled

config.name: auto
config.description: Automatically enable game mode when matching windows are detected

config.name: patterns
config.description: Glob patterns to match window class for auto mode

config.name: hysteresis
config.description: Debounce delay in seconds before toggling game mode
